title: coleus scutellarioides var. laciniatus
intro: Coleus scutellarioides var. laciniatus, also known as the split-leaf coleus, is a variety of the coleus scutellarioides plant, a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of coleus scutellarioides var. laciniatus include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help reduce pain, improve circulation, and protect against cell damage. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
